# ParamEncoding.DecodeHeaderValue method

Decodes a header value back to its string form, decoding the Base64 payload first when the sentinel is present. (R-9.5.3-d) This is the exact inverse of [`EncodeHeaderValue`](./EncodeHeaderValue.md).

```csharp
public static string DecodeHeaderValue(string headerValue)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| headerValue | The (possibly sentinel-encoded) header value. |

## Return Value

The decoded string.
